title: FindingsReport
description: Unified compliance findings report produced by Agent H. Consolidates all findings from the 6-agent pipeline into a single, auditable, analytics-ready document. Every finding carries mandatory evidence pointers, human oversight flags, and downstream traceability links.

schema_version.description: Schema version — increment on breaking changes to maintain backward compatibility

run_id.description: Matches context_packet_id from Agent A — propagated unchanged so every artifact in the run shares the same ID

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of when Agent H produced this report

agent_source.description: Always 'agent_h_orchestrator' — records which agent consolidated the findings

regulation_source.description: Relative path to the source regulation file ingested by Agent A

jurisdiction.description: Primary jurisdiction inherited from context_packet (e.g. EU, US, UK)

findings.description: Ordered list of findings — sorted by severity then priority (Critical → High → Medium → Low)

FindingsSummary.description: Aggregated counts for quick dashboard display and board-level reporting

by_policy_area.description: Finding count per compliance domain (KYC, Monitoring, Audit, etc.)

human_review_required_count.description: Number of findings that require human SME review before remediation can proceed

Finding.description: One atomic compliance finding — the canonical unit of output for the IRCMS pipeline. Each finding links a regulatory requirement change to a gap, a control, an impact assessment, and a remediation action.

finding_id.description: Unique finding identifier assigned by Agent H (e.g. FND-001)

change_id.description: Foreign key to change_register.json — traces this finding to the extracted regulatory change

gap_id.description: Foreign key to gap_analysis.json — links to the gap identified by Agent C

policy_area.description: Compliance domain (e.g. KYC, Monitoring, Audit, DataPrivacy, Reporting, General)

finding_type.description: gap=policy not met; control_gap=no control covers requirement; impact=downstream system effect; exception=escalated triage item

status.description: Non-compliant: direct conflict with existing policy. Partial: some coverage exists. Needs Review: ambiguous, requires human judgement. Compliant: no gap. Escalated: severity/deadline triggered automatic escalation. Auto-closed: informational change with no action required.

severity.description: Risk severity if this finding is not resolved before effective_date

confidence.description: Pipeline confidence in this finding (0.0–1.0). Below 0.80 triggers human_oversight.review_required=true

finding_description.description: Plain-language explanation of exactly what is missing or misaligned — written for a compliance officer, not a developer

analytics_tags.description: Free-form tags for analytics filtering (status, policy area, severity, jurisdiction, special flags)

EvidencePointer.description: Mandatory traceable evidence — every finding must link back to a verbatim paragraph in the source regulation. Auditors use source_quote to verify without re-reading the full document.

evidence_id.description: Foreign key to evidence_index.json (e.g. EV-001) — enables full chain-of-custody tracing

source_section.description: Section header from the regulation (e.g. 'Section 4.7 - Beneficial Ownership Verification')

source_file.description: Relative path to the original regulation file used as evidence

source_quote.description: Verbatim excerpt from the regulation — the exact text that triggered this finding. Auditors rely on this to verify conclusions without re-reading the full document.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 prefix (12 chars) of source_quote — used for tamper detection and idempotent re-run verification

CurrentState.description: The current internal policy or control state as it exists before remediation

policy_id.description: Identifier of the current policy (e.g. POL-001), or empty string if no policy exists

text.description: Current policy text — what the organisation does today

owner.description: Team or role responsible for maintaining this policy

RequiredState.description: What the regulation mandates — the target state after remediation

requirement_text.description: The regulatory requirement verbatim or closely paraphrased

source_section.description: Section of the regulation that mandates this change

effective_date.description: ISO date from which the regulation is enforceable (e.g. 2026-09-01)

RemediationRef.description: Actionable remediation plan — feeds directly into remediation_plan.md and GRC task creation

recommended_action.description: Concrete step to close the gap — specific enough to assign as a task

effort_estimate.description: Implementation effort (Low = < 1 week; Medium = 1–4 weeks; High = > 4 weeks)

suggested_owner.description: Team or role best placed to execute the remediation

target_deadline.description: ISO date — hard implementation target, set 30 days before effective_date

routing_category.description: Routing decision from Agent H (e.g. 'Compliance Lead Escalation', 'Legal Review', 'Policy Owner Remediation')

HumanOversight.description: Flags where automation lacks full certainty and human SME input is required. open_questions are routed to legal or compliance for interpretation before remediation proceeds.

review_required.description: true when confidence < 0.80, regulatory language is ambiguous, or severity is Critical

review_reason.description: One sentence explaining why a human must review this finding before remediation can proceed

open_questions.description: Specific legal or regulatory questions that require SME input — each item should be a single answerable question

flagged_ambiguities.description: Verbatim phrases from the regulation text that are vague, contradictory, or open to multiple interpretations

DownstreamLinks.description: Cross-references to other pipeline outputs — enables full chain-of-custody tracing from finding back to source and forward to remediation task

control_id.description: Foreign key to control_inventory (e.g. CTRL-001), or empty string if no control exists

exception_category.description: Exception routing decision from Agent H — matches exception_routing keys in policy_pack.yaml

FindingMetadata.description: Provenance record — which agent produced this finding, when, and using what model

model.description: AI model used (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6') or 'rule_based_fallback' if API was unavailable

analysis_source.description: Whether this finding was produced by the Claude API or the deterministic fallback
